body:
### Evangelion Mod
## Biome, Mobs, & Loot

This mod is based on Neon Genesis Evangelion. It adds:
mobs, a new biome, structures, & a few crafting recipes with unique weapons.

You’ll meet characters like Rei & Asuka. They’ll stay neutral until you attack them — but if you choose to fight, you’ll get some nice rewards. Their houses also appear in the world and may contain something useful inside.

There’s also a new biome & several structures scattered across the map.

 

New weapons & crafting recipes will help you survive and fight. All of it is inspired by Evangelion, but even if you’re not familiar with the anime, it’s still a fun mod to explore.

New thing's in Last version
Added:
--PenPen
--Bloodarite(new ore type)
--Blood ore(drop from Bloodarite)
--Blood ingot(Result of smelting Blood Ore)
--Blood(liquid needed for Spear final craft)
